author: lOrm
content: FORBIDDEN: title says lsp.rs but the cited code (map_while(Result::ok) at lines 117-125 and 131-138) actually lives in src/tools/bash/mod.rs (reader threads inside the bash spawn path). src/tools/bash/* is on the locked file list for this bulk pass. Mandated refactor (read_until(b'\n') into Vec<u8> with from_utf8_lossy on drain, or side-channel IoError capture) stands for a bash-focused worktree.
